ddls:
CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of district (e.g., State, Congressional) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the district */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the district */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the district in square miles */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the district per square mile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, public) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization that the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the organization that the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year of the data accessed */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district whose data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report's content */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., demographic analysis, trend analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the permission allows */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "FORECAST_DATA" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast entry */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* District ID */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Forecast year */,
  "forecast_population" INTEGER /* Total forecast population */,
  "forecast_urban_population" INTEGER /* Forecast urban population */,
  "forecast_rural_population" INTEGER /* Forecast rural population */,
  "forecast_male" INTEGER /* Forecast male population */,
  "forecast_female" INTEGER /* Forecast female population */,
  "forecast_education_high_school_graduate" INTEGER /* Forecast high school graduates */,
  "forecast_education_bachelors_degree" INTEGER /* Forecast bachelor degree holders */,
  "forecast_education_advanced_degree" INTEGER /* Forecast advanced degree holders */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_FORECAST_DATA_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "FORECAST_ACCESS" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district whose forecast data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the forecast data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the forecast data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_FORECAST_ACCESS_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES FORECAST_DATA ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_FORECAST_ACCESS_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
